title: Sharing Lesson Story for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
CRUNCH CRUNCH! The cookie plate wiggles on the table!
A sweet moral lesson story where Benny shares a cookie with friends.
Toddlers learn thank you, kindness, and taking turns in a safe cartoon.
Gentle American English story for preschool kids ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
